description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push events with tags. The workflow should run on multiple platforms (ubuntu-16.04, macos-latest, windows-latest) with different architectures (x64, x86) and build configurations. For each platform, it should check out the code, set up Qt environment, build the project using cmake, and then package and release the project in various formats (AppImage, deb, dmg, exe, zip).
